results.scenario: step1: toggle renders (Disabled badge) + persists (Active, both switches checked after save+reload)
step2: auto-ack fires within seconds via live worker + body contains BOTH disclosure lines, AI-authored (ai_authored=1, who_type=Agent)
step3: idempotent — exactly ONE ack note after re-dispatching the loop twice more (1 run/1 append-only log)
step4: disabled = no ack — feature OFF, new ticket gets 0 runs / 0 ack notes (loop never dispatched)
step5: design audit of AI Technician card (impeccable + axe + 3 viewports) — 19/20 Excellent, no fileable card-specific design defect
